0.text: Primary mass in the middle lobe of the right lung

1.text: Almost complete loss of aeration in the right middle lobe

2.text: Adjacent nodular density increases in the left lower lobe superior segment

3.text: Fragmented mass in the left lower lobe superior segment post-radiotherapy

4.text: Nodules measuring approximately 14x8 mm in both lungs

5.text: Largest nodule in the peripheral area of the posterior segment of the right upper lobe

7.text: Subcentimeter nodules in the left lung

8.text: Consolidation or atelectasis in the posterobasal segment of the right lower lobe
